---
title: "Hello Plotscape"
author: "Adam Bartonicek"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

devtools::load_all()

ps_scene(mtcars, 900, 600) |>
  ps_scatter(list(x = "wt", y = "mpg")) |>
  ps_histo(list(x = "drat")) |>
  ps_scatter(list(x = "disp", y = "qsec")) |>
  ps_bar(list(x = "am")) |>
  ps_wrapper_plot("square", list(x = "gear", y = "cyl"))

```

## You can have interactive plots that communicate together in RMarkdown!


```{r}

ps_scene(MASS::Boston, 900, 500) |>
  ps_scatter(list(x = "age", y = "medv")) |>
  ps_bar(list(x = "chas")) |>
  ps_scatter(list(x = "nox", y = "dis")) |>
  ps_histo(list(x = "crim")) |>
  ps_histo(list(x = "ptratio"))

```
